result.title: Diameter of Binary Tree
result.summary: Solution implemented using optimal O(n) single-pass DFS approach. Core algorithm: calculate height bottom-up while tracking global maximum diameter (sum of left+right heights at each node). Code written to /Users/gbang/Downloads/algora_java/workspace/java-coding-treediameter-001/Solution.java. Logic verified for all edge cases: single node (0), linear trees, diameter not through root, and example case [1,2,3,4,5]→3. Unable to execute tests due to missing Java runtime on system, but solution correctness confirmed through algorithmic analysis and manual trace.
